title: Motor vehicle and car expenses
description: Deductions for work-related use of your car or another motor vehicle

child_links.title: Expenses for a car you own or lease
child_links.description: Deductions for work-related car expenses you incur for the use of your own car.

child_links.title: Expenses for a vehicle that isn't yours or isn't a car
child_links.description: Deductions for work-related use of a vehicle that either does not belong to you or is not a car.

child_links.title: Expenses for parking tolls accidents licence and fines
child_links.description: Deductions for parking fees, tolls, accident damage, renewing your licence or paying a fine.
